description: General OS performance metrics to assess the availability and performance of Linux and Windows systems. Leverages OpenTelemetry metrics collected with MetricsHub and stored in Prometheus.

sourceQuery.expr:
label_replace(metricshub.host.up.ping{host.name="$host_name"}, "protocol", "ping", "", "")
or
label_replace(metricshub.host.up.ssh{host.name="$host_name"}, "protocol", "ssh", "", "")
or
label_replace(metricshub.host.up.http{host.name="$host_name"}, "protocol", "http", "", "")
or
label_replace(metricshub.host.up.snmp{host.name="$host_name"}, "protocol", "snmp", "", "")
or
label_replace(metricshub.host.up.snmpv3{host.name="$host_name"}, "protocol", "snmpv3", "", "")
or
label_replace(metricshub.host.up.wmi{host.name="$host_name"}, "protocol", "wmi", "", "")
or
label_replace(metricshub.host.up.wbem{host.name="$host_name"}, "protocol", "wbem", "", "")

panels.description: Utilization of the busiest core/processor, to identify CPU contention
panels.title: Max CPU Utilization

panels.description: Utilization of the busiest disk, to identify disk contention
panels.title: Max Disk Utilization

undefined{VictoriaMetrics_AccountID="965051025", agent.host.name="lab-win-01.internal.sentrysoftware.net", connector_id="Windows", entityTypeId="system_cpu", host.name="anaxagore", host.type="compute", hostType="server", hostname="anaxagore", isDeviceMappingEnabled="true", os.type="windows", parentEntityName="system_cpu_container", parentEntityTypeId="system_cpu_container", site="Sentry-Thésée", source="OTEL", system.cpu.state="idle", unit="s"}

undefined{VictoriaMetrics_AccountID="965051025", agent.host.name="lab-win-01.internal.sentrysoftware.net", connector_id="Windows", entityTypeId="system_cpu", host.name="anaxagore", host.type="compute", hostType="server", hostname="anaxagore", isDeviceMappingEnabled="true", os.type="windows", parentEntityName="system_cpu_container", parentEntityTypeId="system_cpu_container", site="Sentry-Thésée", source="OTEL", system.cpu.state="user", unit="s"}

sourceQuery.expr:
avg by (host.name, cpu_state) (
  label_replace(rate(system.cpu.time.user{host.name="$host_name"}[$__rate_interval]), "cpu_state", "user", ".*", "")
  or
  label_replace(rate(system.cpu.time.system{host.name="$host_name"}[$__rate_interval]), "cpu_state", "system", ".*", "")
  or
  label_replace(rate(system.cpu.time.io_wait{host.name="$host_name"}[$__rate_interval]), "cpu_state", "io_wait", ".*", "")
  or
  label_replace(rate(system.cpu.time.nice{host.name="$host_name"}[$__rate_interval]), "cpu_state", "nice", ".*", "")
)

(
  sum by (system.device) (
    label_replace(system.filesystem.utilization.used{host.name="$host_name", system.filesystem.type !~"$filesystemFilter"}, "fs_state", "used", "", "")
    or
    label_replace(system.filesystem.utilization.reserved{host.name="$host_name", system.filesystem.type !~"$filesystemFilter"}, "fs_state", "reserved", "", "")
  )
)
-
(
  sum by (system.device) (
    label_replace(system.filesystem.utilization.used{host.name="$host_name", system.filesystem.type !~"$filesystemFilter"} offset $__range, "fs_state", "used", "", "")
    or
    label_replace(system.filesystem.utilization.reserved{host.name="$host_name", system.filesystem.type !~"$filesystemFilter"} offset $__range, "fs_state", "reserved", "", "")
  )
)

sum by (system.device) (
  label_replace(
    system.filesystem.utilization.used{host.name="$host_name", system.filesystem.type !~"$filesystemFilter"},
    "fs_state", "used", "", ""
  )
  or
  label_replace(
    system.filesystem.utilization.reserved{host.name="$host_name", system.filesystem.type !~"$filesystemFilter"},
    "fs_state", "reserved", "", ""
  )
)

sum by (system.device) (
  label_replace(
    system.filesystem.usage.used{host.name="$host_name", system.filesystem.type !~"$filesystemFilter"},
    "fs_state", "used", "", ""
  )
  or
  label_replace(
    system.filesystem.usage.reserved{host.name="$host_name", system.filesystem.type !~"$filesystemFilter"},
    "fs_state", "reserved", "", ""
  )
  or
  label_replace(
    system.filesystem.usage.free{host.name="$host_name", system.filesystem.type !~"$filesystemFilter"},
    "fs_state", "free", "", ""
  )
)

sum by (system.device) (
  label_replace(
    system.filesystem.usage.used{host.name="$host_name", system.filesystem.type !~"$filesystemFilter"},
    "fs_state", "used", "", ""
  )
  or
  label_replace(
    system.filesystem.usage.reserved{host.name="$host_name", system.filesystem.type !~"$filesystemFilter"},
    "fs_state", "reserved", "", ""
  )
)

list.description: Excludes all filesystems whose type matches the specified regular expression
list.label: Exclude Filesystem Types
list.name: filesystemFilter

title: System Performance Metrics (MetricsHub)
